choice: Session active-household + switcher, defaulting to last-used; if no last-used household exists, list all the households the user is associated with for them to choose.
rationale: Human-chosen during grooming (overrode recommendation: Keep a per-user 'active household' as session state, defaulting to the only membership (or last-used when there are several), with an in-app switcher; every data request resolves against that active household. Single-household users (the common case) never see a chooser.)
